hero.body: We design and build AI-powered systems and automations that help businesses move smarter, cut manual work, and deliver results without friction.

chat.title: NEOKUKEY Assistant
chat.initialMessage: Hi! Ask me anything about NEOKUKEY — our services, process, or how AI automation could work for your business.

suggested.industries: What industries do you work with?

responses.default: That's a great question. At NEOKUKEY, we tailor every solution to your specific workflow — the best next step is a short discovery call. Would you like to book one?
responses.automate: We automate document processing, data pipelines, multi-step workflows, and AI-driven decisions. Most clients reduce manual work by 60–80% within the first month.
responses.timeline: A focused project typically ships in 2–4 weeks. Larger integrations take 6–10 weeks. We work in tight iterations so you see results early.
responses.data: Data pipelines are a core strength — ingestion, transformation, enrichment, and delivery across SQL, APIs, spreadsheets, and documents.
responses.industries: We've worked across professional services, e-commerce, logistics, SaaS, and finance. The common thread is repetitive knowledge work.

services.label: What we do
services.headingMain: Built for teams that want results,

automation.title: Rapid Automation
automation.description: We scope, build, and ship automations in days — most projects are live within two to four weeks.

integration.title: End-to-End Integration
integration.description: We wire your systems together — APIs, databases, internal tools — so information flows without friction.

reliability.title: Reliable by Design
reliability.description: Every system includes error handling and monitoring so things keep running when you're not watching.

about.label: About

about.body: We design and build AI-powered systems and automations that help businesses move smarter and cut manual work. Below are the people you'll be working with.

contact.label: Contact

contact.body: Want to discuss a project or ask a question? Reach out to our team directly.
